enableWhitelist.desc: Restrict joining to whitelisted Steam/player IDs only.

logDirectory.desc: Path (relative to server folder) where server logs are written.

password.desc: Set the join password for your server (leave blank for none).

port.desc: UDP port the server will bind to.

query_port.desc: UDP query port used for server listing.

saveDirectory.desc: Path (relative to server folder) where world saves are stored.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/enshrouded && until [ -f /tmp/enshrouded/enshrouded_server.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2278520 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 2278520 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/enshrouded +login anonymous +app_update 2278520 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/enshrouded/enshrouded_server.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/enshrouded/. . && rm -rf /tmp/enshrouded'

run.command:
sh -c 'id -u enshrouded >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m enshrouded || adduser -D enshrouded; mkdir -p /home/enshrouded/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/enshrouded/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/enshrouded/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R enshrouded:enshrouded . /home/enshrouded/.steam; cat > enshrouded_server.json << EOF
{
  "name": "${name}",
  "password": "${password}",
  "saveDirectory": "${saveDirectory}",
  "logDirectory": "${logDirectory}",
  "ip": "0.0.0.0",
  "gamePort": ${port},
  "queryPort": ${query_port},
  "slotCount": ${slots},
  "enableWhitelist": ${enableWhitelist},
  "whitelist": [],
  "adminIds": []
}
EOF
chown enshrouded:enshrouded enshrouded_server.json; exec runuser -u enshrouded -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/enshrouded/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./enshrouded_server.exe'
